method.conditions: Stirred solution of Henna leaf powder and  40mL of distilled water. Then heated at 180°C for 12h in Teflon-lined stainless-steel autoclave

post_treatment: Purification with centrifugal filters (10 kDa MW cutoff)

optical.emission_max: 430 nm (core emission) with shoulder at 500 nm

structural.morphology: narrow size distribution, quasi-spherical and well dispersed
structural.crystallinity: Raman intensity ratio of the D and G band equals 0.74 indicating amorphous carbons

applications.performance: Linear range: 0.02-18 μmol/L; Limit of detection (LOD): 7 nmol/L; RSD: 1.7-2.6% for five repeated measurements of (2.0μmolL-1) and (0.15 μmolL-1) MTX, respectively.
applications.comparative_advantage: Green synthesis, low-cost, comparable LOD and dynamic range compared with other reported methods.

applications.performance: Effective against Escherichia coli (Gram-negative) and Staphylococcus aureus (Gram-positive). Antibacterial effects of CDs, on Gram-negative bacteria,were observed in more concentrations.
applications.comparative_advantage: Henna CDs show antibacterial activity at much lower concentrations than raw Henna plant extract. Effective against both Gram-positive and Gram-negative bacteria, unlike many conventional agents.

feedback.label: Bad
feedback.expert_comment: Omission Error: The field 'carbon_dots -> properties -> optical -> excitation_max' contained '360 nm (maximum emission intensity), 440 nm selected for sensing experiments' in the source text, but it was extracted as null/missing. | Omission Error: The field 'carbon_dots -> general_info -> definition' contained 'High fluorescence carbon dots synthesized from a natural plant source (Lawsonia inermis, Henna), without adding any chemical reagent exhibit high stability under various conditions and exceptionally solubility in hydrophilic solvents' in the source text, but it was extracted as null/missing. | Numerical Hallucination: The correct value for carbon_dots -> properties -> structural -> size -> avg was 'diameter 5nm', but the model hallucinated 'diameter 36.77nm'.
